---
title: "Projects"
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

```{=html}
<div class="page-header container">
  <p class="page-header-label">Work</p>
  <h1 class="page-header-title">Projects</h1>
  <p class="page-header-sub">
    Applied research, teaching tools, and data storytelling experiments.
    Each project is built around a real methodological question.
  </p>
</div>
```

---

::: {.project-grid}

::: {.project-card .project-card-featured}
<span class="project-card-tag">Data Storytelling · Teaching Module</span>
<p class="project-card-title">Hip-Hop Database</p>
<p class="project-card-desc">
  A fully documented dataset of 138 hip-hop artists scored across five lyricism
  dimensions, enriched with Billboard chart data, award counts, career metrics,
  and a custom atomic weight formula. Built to teach measurement validity,
  sampling bias, composite scoring, and uncertainty communication — using a
  subject matter executives actually argue about. Includes an interactive
  periodic table and a multi-tab analytical dashboard.
</p>
<div class="project-card-meta">
  <span><span class="project-card-accent" style="background:#4472C4;"></span>R / Quarto</span>
  <span><span class="project-card-accent" style="background:#70AD47;"></span>HTML / JS</span>
  <span><span class="project-card-accent" style="background:#ED7D31;"></span>Excel / readxl</span>
  <span><span class="project-card-accent" style="background:#9B59B6;"></span>Interactive</span>
</div>
<br>
<a href="hiphop/index.html" style="font-weight:600; color:#2B2D42;">
  View project →
</a>
:::

:::

---

::: {style="text-align: center; padding: 3rem 0 1rem; color: #6b7280; font-size: 0.9rem;"}
More projects coming soon.
:::
